semantic_metrics.description: 预定义的业务指标和计算逻辑，AI 可以直接引用这些指标，避免重复构建复杂表达式

duration_seconds.name: 执行时长（秒）
duration_seconds.usage_hint: 计算性能指标的基础公式

process_key.name: 流程定义Key
process_key.description: 提取流程定义Key，去除版本号

avg_duration_seconds.name: 平均执行时长
avg_duration_seconds.description: 流程平均执行时长（秒），保留2位小数

p95_duration_seconds.name: P95执行时长
p95_duration_seconds.formula: ROUND((PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (end_time - start_time))))::numeric, 2)

success_rate.name: 成功率
success_rate.formula: ROUND((100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('COMPLETED', 'COMPLETED_WITH_ERROR') THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))::numeric, 2)

failure_rate.name: 失败率
failure_rate.formula: ROUND((100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))::numeric, 2)

metric_templates.description: 预定义的 CTE 模板，用于复杂分析场景

time_series_hourly.name: 按小时时间序列分析
time_series_hourly.description: 将数据按小时分组，统计每小时的指标
time_series_hourly.cte_template:
WITH hourly_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('hour', start_time) as hour_bucket,
    COUNT(*) as execution_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('COMPLETED', 'COMPLETED_WITH_ERROR') THEN 1 END) as success_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 END) as failed_count,
    ROUND((AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (end_time - start_time))))::numeric, 2) as avg_duration_seconds,
    ROUND((PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (end_time - start_time))))::numeric, 2) as p95_duration_seconds
  FROM {table_name}
  WHERE start_time >= {time_range}
    AND end_time IS NOT NULL
    {additional_filters}
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', start_time)
  ORDER BY hour_bucket DESC
)

top_k_by_metric.name: 按指标排序的 TOP K
top_k_by_metric.description: 找出某个指标最高/最低的 K 个对象

comparison_period.name: 时间段对比分析
comparison_period.description: 对比两个时间段的指标变化

multi_table_join.name: 多表关联分析
multi_table_join.description: 关联多张表进行综合分析

simple_metric_usage.generated_sql:
SELECT 
  ROUND((AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (end_time - start_time))))::numeric, 2) as avg_duration_seconds
FROM pe_ext_procinst
WHERE status IN ('COMPLETED', 'COMPLETED_WITH_ERROR')
  AND end_time IS NOT NULL
